message:
fix: update dependencies to resolve security advisories

Resolves RUSTSEC-2026-0044 (aws-lc-sys X.509 Name Constraints Bypass) and
RUSTSEC-2026-0048 (aws-lc-sys CRL Distribution Point Scope Check).
Note: RUSTSEC-2025-0140 (gix-date) remains — requires vergen-gix major version bump.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
